TextView.android:text: General radio settings stored at EEPROM 0x1900. Tap Save Settings to write changes to the in-memory EEPROM, then use Save to Radio to upload to the device.

⚠ Fields marked ⚠ use EEPROM offsets or encodings not fully confirmed. Verify values match your radio before saving: Scrambler IF (3400/3500 Hz options unverified), TX Filter Trans (offset unconfirmed).
